diagrams.title: Structure Pointer Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how a pointer variable holds the address of a structure variable in memory
diagrams.purpose: Understand how pointers store addresses and how arrow operator accesses members through that address

diagrams.title: Linked List Node Structure
diagrams.description: Visual representation of a self-referential structure used in linked lists
elements: Arrows showing pointer links between nodes
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how self-referential structures create chains of nodes for linked data structures

diagrams.title: Pass by Value vs Pass by Reference
diagrams.description: Comparison showing how structure is copied vs referenced when passed to functions
elements: Stack frame showing copied structure (pass by value)
Pointer pointing to original (pass by reference)
diagrams.purpose: Understand memory differences and effect on original data when passing structures to functions

diagrams.title: Dynamic Memory Allocation for Structures
diagrams.description: Shows heap memory allocation for structures using malloc and memory lifecycle
diagrams.purpose: Understand dynamic allocation process, proper deallocation, and avoiding dangling pointers
